mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name, u.phone, o.id as oid, o.order_no FROM complaint c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN service_order o ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name, u.phone, o.order_no FROM complaint c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN service_order o ON c.order_id = o.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name, u.phone, o.order_no FROM complaint c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN service_order o ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO complaint(owner_id, order_id, content, status, create_time) VALUES(#{ownerId}, #{orderId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE complaint SET reply = #{reply}, status = 1, handle_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
